mapper.sql: id, key_hash, key_prefix, user_id, service_id, expires_at, is_active, version_no, create_time, update_time, last_used_at, deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mcp_auth_keys (key_hash, key_prefix, user_id, service_id, expires_at, is_active) VALUES (#{keyHash}, #{keyPrefix}, #{userId}, #{serviceId}, #{expiresAt}, #{isActive})
mapper.update: UPDATE mcp_auth_keys SET is_active = #{isActive}, expires_at = #{expiresAt}, version_no = version_no + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND version_no = #{versionNo} AND deleted = b'0'
UPDATE mcp_auth_keys SET deleted = b'1' WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = b'0'
mapper.select: SELECT FROM mcp_auth_keys WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = b'0'
SELECT FROM mcp_auth_keys WHERE key_hash = #{keyHash} AND deleted = b'0'
SELECT FROM mcp_auth_keys WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = b'0' ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM mcp_auth_keys WHERE service_id = #{serviceId} AND deleted = b'0' ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM mcp_auth_keys WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND service_id = #{serviceId} AND deleted = b'0' LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE mcp_auth_keys SET is_active = b'0', version_no = version_no + 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND service_id = #{serviceId} AND is_active = b'1' AND deleted = b'0'
